$comment: Locked production defaults for the clip-treatment toolkit. Read this from the workflow so the 'always use X' rules can't drift. Updated 2026-05-20 per user. Companion docs: shared sheet 1v1pI_x1s7ermhkG1ryNxhNxelDQuliCM6l-3hHRwwY8 (Animation Library tab), memory copyright_treatment_defaults.md.

copyrighted_video.rationale: User-locked default 2026-05-20: broadcast cyan-orange + frame composite is the production-blessed transformative treatment for third-party video footage. If the clip's audio is kept (vo-pause workflow), apply pitch_up_1st to the audio track in parallel.

copyrighted_image.rationale: User-locked default 2026-05-20: archival crushed-warm grade + frame composite is the production-blessed transformative treatment for third-party still images.

copyrighted_audio.rationale: User-locked default 2026-05-21 (after sampling pitch_down 1-2st and pitch_up 1-3st): pitch_up_1st is the production default for any potentially copyrighted audio. Applies to standalone third-party audio AND to a video clip's audio track when we keep it (vo-pause workflow). loudnorm to -14 LUFS is auto-appended by apply_audio_treatment().

character_image.rationale: Character images use the main flow's character-card system, NOT the copyright wrap rule. The copyright wrap is for B-roll / event / document / scene imagery.

experimental_frames_note: The 8 approved frames above are the production-blessed library. Other frames in hyperframes_project/compositions/ (frame-wax-letter, frame-ledger, frame-telex, frame-projector, frame-pocket-watch, frame-radio-broadcast, frame-globe, frame-photo-album, frame-candlelight, frame-train-window, frame-map-route) are experimental — usable but not the production default. Add to approved_frames here AND the shared sheet (rows 22+) once a frame is blessed.

experimental_audio_pending_review.$comment: Pitch-shift recipes — 2026-05-21 user evaluation outcome: pitch_up_1st promoted to production default (see rules.copyrighted_audio above). The others remain available but are not the locked default.
